briefs.title: BC Municipalities Exempt from Provincial Highway Approval for Housing-Density Rezoning Until Jan 2026
briefs.summary: BC updated rules so that municipalities don't need provincial approval to rezone (change land-use rules) land for required small-scale housing density, unless that land needs direct access to a controlled-access highway (like a freeway).
briefs.action_required: If your property is near a controlled-access highway, check with your municipality before assuming new housing zoning applies to you.

key_dates.label: BC housing-needs rezoning approval exemption expires — ministerial approval required after this date
